Mechanical watches built one at a time.

Browse completed builds, choose a base, and tune the case, dial, bezel, hands, strap, and finish into a watch that feels specifically yours.

Start a build View finished watches
Built for real wear. Automatic movements, pressure-tested cases, sapphire crystals, and straps selected around how each owner will use the watch.
Made collaborative. Clients start with a proven base, then narrow the visual decisions without needing to know every technical term.

How it works

From idea to wrist

01

Choose a base

Start with a proven case size and movement style, then decide how the watch should feel: tool-like, refined, vintage, or bold.

02

Approve the spec

You receive a clear parts list, visual direction, timing, and price range before anything is ordered or assembled.

03

Build and test

The watch is assembled, regulated, checked for fit and finish, and photographed before handoff or shipping.

Inquiries

Have a direction already?

Send a note with a few details: wrist size, favorite watches, where you plan to wear it, and any colors or materials you know you want.

Email the studio
